# 📈 AI模拟盘 自动交易报告

本项目利用 Github Action 定时运行 Claude Code，并结合MCP工具，实现在欧易模拟盘环境下自动交易。

xychart
    title "模拟盘余额"
    line [105739,105374,105227,104691,104924,104762,106364,105628,106608,106748,106872,106485,106721,106468,107132,107620,107224,107080,107001,106717,106567,105431,105431,105440,99950,100017,100113,100337,93749,83795,83807,83567,83567,83342,75168,83222,83336,84448,84449,83896,84839,85065,84499,84757,84757,84364,84347,81254,82385,82835,83184,84099,85150,85150,85002,84751,84096,83356,82582,82983,82404,82572,82512,82688,82200,82047,81920,82125,80840,79688,80060,79552,79920,79470,80236,80208,80170,80336,79894,80006,80954,80837,80712,78561,78139,78037,78293,78682,79720,79720,79214,79372,79279,79591,80046,79993,82625,82950,82626,82571,82633,82670,82670,82681,83386,83378,83464,83579,83920,84037,83402,84160,84142,83652,82655,82655,82145,82315,82243,82163,80934,80770,81371,80742,80468,80989,80989,81067,80191,80155,80450,80737,81309,81309,81106,81119,81119,80471,80631,79624,80670,81448,81290,81429,79212,79222,79940,78643,78380,77432,77623,77504,78235,78358,78284,78277,79048,78714,78714,79290,79308,79567,78763,78563,79603,79988,79652,79813,79813,79476,79469,79673,79995,80015,80015,80486,80314,80600,80436,79966,79689,79689,79819,79692,79692,79850,79850,79518,79071,78889,78850,78850,78878,78878,76554,77202,77103,78357,78510,78106,76678,76677,76672,76411,76159,76485,75656,74695,75197,75246,75052,75334,76564,76179,76553,76551,79196,78300,78300,77944,78531,78531,78521,81564,81884,80160,79335,79055,78675,78580,78708,78764,76179,76586,76902,76876,77658,77669,78346,79023,79769,80497,80366,79761,79896,79448,79126,79749,79658,79097,77695,78114,78888,79126,78249,78738,78653,78478,79271,81680,80923,81488,81527,80681,80455,80190,79084,78879,79193,78686,79954,80403,80374,80118,79848,80491,82665,83351,83098,83525,85430,85983,85737,85221,83378,83014,83043,82613,82216,80477,80208,80081,80348,80277,79894,79670,79965,80093,79786,79542]

- **BTC**: $42688.1
- **ETH**: $19575.3
- **SOL**: $3550.8
- **USDT**: $13724.4

## 交易记录
- 2026-03-07T19:07:16.200699 - Maintain existing live limit sell 12 SOL at 85.2 USDT
- 2026-03-07T19:07:16.200696 - Place limit sell 0.35 ETH at 1988 USDT (order live, unfilled)
- 2026-03-07T16:48:54.631177 - Placed limit sell order on SOL-USDT: 12 SOL @ 85.2 USDT (ordId: 3368851257620439040), current status: live (unfilled).
- 2026-03-07T09:13:40.946444 - No BTC/SOL orders executed in this cycle to avoid overtrading without stronger 1H confirmation.
- 2026-03-07T09:13:40.946442 - Order is live and unfilled; approximately 886.5 USDT is frozen for the open order.
- 2026-03-07T09:13:40.946439 - Placed 1 limit buy order: ETH-USDT 0.45 ETH @ 1970 USDT (cash mode).
- 2026-03-07T07:03:20.042292 - SELL SOL-USDT market 10.69 @ 84.02, ordId=3367673964235595776, clOrdId=exec260307solsig74c1, fee=0.8981738 USDT, rationale=high-risk SOL sell signal with spot-only de-risking.
- 2026-03-07T03:08:05.184339 - Executed market sell 0.5 ETH on ETH-USDT (order 3367199496413388800), fully filled at 1982.4 USDT with 0.9912 USDT fee.
- 2026-03-07T03:08:05.184337 - Placed limit sell 0.5 ETH at 1995 USDT (order 3367198176717578240), then canceled after no fill.
- 2026-03-07T03:08:05.184333 - Selected ETH-USDT short-side execution due to higher-confidence sell signal and sufficient USDT liquidity.

## MCP工具
- [mcp-aktools](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-aktools): 用于查询价格走势及行情
- [mcp-okx](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-okx): 用于获取欧易账户信息和下单
- [mcp-notify](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-notify): 用于推送分析结果到指定渠道(可选)
- [mcp-hooks](https://github.com/aahl/ai-trading/tree/main/mcp-hooks.py): 用于保存交易结果和更新Readme
